debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (nhdsWithin 0 {0}ᶜ) (nhds r)

failed_attempts:
have hd : HasDerivAt (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x)) r 0 := by
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun x => r * x) r 0 := by
      simpa using (hasDerivAt_id (0 : ℝ)).const_mul r
    have h2 := (Real.hasDerivAt_sinh (r * 0)).comp 0 h1
    simp [Real.cosh_zero] at h2
    exact h2
  rw [hasDerivAt_iff_tendsto_slope_zero] at hd
  simp only [Real.sinh_zero, mul_zero, sub_zero, smul_eq_mul, zero_add] at hd
  have : (fun t : ℝ => t⁻¹ * Real.sinh (r * t)) = (fun t => Real.sinh (r * t) / t) := by
    ext t; ring
  rwa [this] at hd
